title: Source-built multi-cloud deployment
scenario: Build from pinned source locks into attested images, promote immutable digests, run Compose/CNPG locally, and render GitOps-ready GKE/AKS/EKS manifests with NGINX, Traefik, and Envoy Gateway ingress options plus wildcard and Let's Encrypt TLS examples.
termination: Stop only when locks reject floating refs, images build from pinned sources, SBOM/provenance exists, Compose profiles are ready, CNPG catalogs render, GKE/AKS/EKS overlays render with NGINX/Traefik/Envoy options and TLS examples, and CI contains no direct deployment commands.

prompts.prerequisites: Verify source repositories, full commit SHAs, GHCR ownership, cloud registry targets, OIDC trust, external GitOps repository, BuildKit/buildx, Kustomize, Compose, and CNPG version.
prompts.discovery: Read deployment catalog docs, Docker/BuildKit source context docs, GitHub attestations docs, CNPG docs, Kustomize overlays, ingress/gateway docs, cert-manager/certbot notes, and TJ-CICD-001 ownership.
prompts.feynman: Explain the split between reproducible image build, digest publication, GitOps promotion, ArgoCD reconciliation, and Terraform-owned infrastructure.
prompts.kbd_assess: Assess image inventory, third-party digests, Compose profiles, Kubernetes services, cloud overlays, ingress/gateway options, TLS methods, CI authority, and smoke tests.
prompts.kbd_analyze: Analyze current deploy catalog, Dockerfiles, docker-bake graph, lock files, Compose profiles, CNPG catalog, Kustomize overlays, GitHub Actions, and no-direct-deploy checks.
prompts.kbd_spec: Specify pinned locks, BuildKit contexts, SBOM/provenance, GHCR digests, cloud mirrors, Compose profiles, CNPG catalogs, GKE/AKS/EKS overlays, NGINX/Traefik/Envoy examples, wildcard and Let's Encrypt TLS, and direct-deploy prohibition.
prompts.kbd_plan: Plan lock validation first, then local builds, Compose readiness, Kustomize rendering, ingress/gateway/TLS variants, CI attestations, promotion PR, critic, and retention.
prompts.research: Use official Docker, GitHub Actions attestations, CNPG, Kubernetes Kustomize, NGINX Ingress, Traefik, Envoy Gateway, cert-manager, Let's Encrypt, and cloud identity docs with access dates.
prompts.implementation: Implement catalog changes without copying upstream source. Use pinned Git contexts or source locks. Keep CI publishing digests and opening GitOps promotions; do not run kubectl apply, helm upgrade, or ArgoCD sync.
prompts.public_boundary_verification: Validate lock schemas, build amd64 images, render Compose profiles, query readiness, render all GKE/AKS/EKS overlays, scan for inline secrets and direct deploy commands, and verify ingress/gateway/TLS examples compile.
prompts.independent_critic: Review pinning, digest use, SBOM/provenance, Compose readiness, CNPG version alignment, cloud overlay separation, NGINX/Traefik/Envoy coverage, TLS examples, and CI authority boundaries.
prompts.reflection_retention: Record deferred native-architecture builds, lock gaps, ingress/TLS lessons, CI authority decisions, and proof commands in Karpathy memory.
prompts.recovery: If a source cannot build reproducibly on the current machine, mark the build target deferred with architecture/toolchain reason and preserve all locks/docs for the native builder.
prompts.stop_conditions: Stop for floating refs, missing digests, unpinned third-party images, inline secrets, direct deployment commands, non-rendering overlays, unsupported PG extension claims, or missing TLS option coverage.
